nodes.name: AOS
nodes.raw:
# AOS

The unified runtime that hosts canvases, perception, action, and coordination.

nodes.name: Toolkit
nodes.raw:
# Toolkit

Provides runtime helpers, panel scaffolding, and reusable components.

nodes.name: Wiki KB
nodes.description: Knowledge browser component built on toolkit panels.
nodes.raw:
# Wiki KB

A graph browser component for wiki-shaped data.

- Force graph view
- Mind map view

nodes.name: Consumer App
nodes.description: An app-level surface that consumes toolkit canvases.
nodes.raw:
# Consumer App

Any app surface can embed toolkit components without changing the component contract.

nodes.name: Coordination
nodes.description: Session messaging and routing over tell/listen.
nodes.raw:
# Coordination

Messages can flow through channels or direct session inboxes.
